subparts.text: What are abstract and final classes in Java?
Explain the life cycle of a servlet.
What do you understand by hibernate? List various principles of hibernate.

questions.question_text: What are the various types of inheritance in Java? Explain each with example. Why is multiple inheritance not allowed in java? Give example. How can it be implemented in java?

subparts.text: What happens when an exception is thrown but there is no catch block to handle it? Explain with example.
WAP to calculate the average marks of a student in 5 subjects. Throw a user defined exception if entered marks are nor between 0-100.

questions.question_text: Explain different stages in the life cycle of a thread. WAP to compute the highest of 1000 integers stored in an array using 2 thread running in parallel. Print the final result.
What is AWT? Write program to create a frame window and add 2 Textboxes, 1 submit Buttons, Name and Roll No Label, and course selection RadioButton and perform event handling on any three controls.
Write the code required to save the details of a student in the table ‘Stud_det’. Also display the details on Console.
Write a JEE code for a servlet that takes an integer as input from a form and displays whether it is prime or not, as a response to the web browser.

subparts.text: How to send and receive an email in java?
Explain the various components of JSF.
